bridge.name: csa-loom-mcp-bridge
bridge.description: stdio→HTTP/SSE bridge for npx/uvx MCP servers. Exposes each catalog entry as an HTTP endpoint the Loom Console External-MCP panel can register one-click. Boundary-aware: entries tagged for a cloud Loom is NOT running in are disabled.

tls.$comment: TLS terminated at the Container App / AKS ingress; the pod listens HTTP.

servers.description: Official MCP reference server exercising tools, prompts, and resources. Use to validate the bridge end-to-end. No outbound network.
Current time and timezone conversion. Pure compute, no outbound network — safe in every boundary.
Read/inspect a Git repository mounted into the bridge (status, log, diff, show). Repo path supplied via the MCP_GIT_REPO env var (allow-listed).
Fetch and convert web content to markdown. Reaches arbitrary public URLs — COMMERCIAL/GCC only; excluded from Gov-High/IL5 catalogs by boundary tag.
